name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled your subscription with Bright Smile Dental — no pressure at all, life gets busy and we get it. We just wanted you to know the door is always open, and your smile is always welcome back.

If it feels right, here's a little thank-you for the time you spent with us: 20% off your next visit.

Your code: {{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days, and you can use it toward a cleaning, a check-up, or whatever care feels useful. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel less scary — free consultations, painless cleanings, and modern tech that takes the edge off.

If there was something about your experience that didn't sit right, we'd genuinely love to hear it — just hit reply. A real person reads every note.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle heads-up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way. 🙂

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
